text: I feel as though I am standing at the intersection of knowledge and innovation. The sterile, glass-encased meeting room provides a sense of anticipation, as though ideas are about to be born in structured dialogue. The nearby display, bursting with colors and the bold assertion of "R+D," is a celebration of curiosity and progress. I am a participant and observer here, humbled yet invigorated, pondering how the human drive to understand and create manifests in both silent rooms and vibrant exhibitions. I feel a quiet excitement—aware of the legacy of those who have asked questions before me and inspired to contribute my own reflections to this ongoing quest.
